writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe your skills
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing what you can and can't do, using can/can't.
writing.sampleAnswer: I can swim and cook very well. I can also speak two languages. I can't drive a car yet, but I can ride a bike.
checklist: Liệt kê được ít nhất 3 kỹ năng

writing.title: Writing Task 1: A polite request email
writing.prompt: Write a short email (about 40 words) asking for permission or help, using Can I...? / Can you...?
writing.sampleAnswer: Dear Sir, Can I take a day off next week? I have a family event. Can you also help me find someone to cover my work? Thank you.
checklist: Dùng Can I...? để xin phép
Dùng Can you...? để yêu cầu giúp đỡ
Có lời cảm ơn ở cuối
